response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates exceptional technical depth, strong developer-tools background, and proven ability to work at scale, they lack the critical people management experience required for this full-time people-leadership role. No evidence of managing direct reports, conducting performance reviews, or developing team members—all core responsibilities of this position. Recent career trajectory (Staff Engineer at re:cinq) suggests continued focus on individual technical contribution rather than organizational leadership.
strengths: Exceptional technical breadth with 20 years of software development across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems; proven expertise in system design at scale (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby)

Deep commitment to developer productivity through testing infrastructure, TDD practices, and educational initiatives (Fluent-Asserts library, Trial test runner, multiple Selenium and testing workshops)
Demonstrated mobile platform expertise and success scaling applications to top-tier visibility (iOS app ranked top 10 in US App Store at WatchUp)
concerns: No demonstrated people management experience despite job requirement of 2 years managing teams; no mention of direct reports, performance reviews, or organizational team development
No evidence of strategic roadmap planning or organizational change leadership at team/organizational level required for mid-to-senior management position
Recent role transition (April 2025) shows movement toward senior technical contribution rather than people leadership, suggesting career focus misaligned with this management track

key_factors.factor: Strong technical depth and developer tools background
Career trajectory favoring technical contribution over organizational leadership
